description_long: This object is a single, mature eggplant with a deep, glossy purple skin and a slightly bulbous, elongated shape. The surface is smooth and reflective, with subtle gradients of green and purple, and a few natural blemishes. At one end, a short, dark green stem is attached, surrounded by a medium-sized, lobed calyx that transitions from green to brown. The opposite end is rounded and slightly flattened, showing the natural growth mark typical of eggplants. The overall form is slightly curved, giving it a natural, organic appearance. The eggplant appears fresh and intact, suitable for culinary use or as urban food waste.
description: A glossy, deep purple eggplant with a green stem and lobed calyx, slightly curved and smooth-skinned.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the eggplant, highlighting its glossy skin and attached stem with calyx.
description_view_1: View from the stem end, focusing on the calyx and the circular attachment point of the stem.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, displaying the smooth curvature and the rounded base of the eggplant.
description_view_3: View from the base, showing the rounded end and the subtle color variations near the bottom.
